title: (Bullish Signal) ALNY, enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Dec 14, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that ALNY's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 82 similar cases where ALNY's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 71 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 87%. Current price $135.19 crossed the support line at $132.74 and is trading between $137.00 support and $132.74 support lines. Throughout the month of 11/11/20 - 12/14/20, the price experienced a +3% Uptrend. During the week of 12/07/20 - 12/14/20, the stock enjoyed a +5% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/oriiu543ge561.png?width=1526&format=png&auto=webp&s=313d60890872315f571da03d989cd6c8a36c0165

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where ALNY's RSI Indicator exited the oversold zone, 26 of 34 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on December 14, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on ALNY as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 71 of 82 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 87%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for ALNY just turned positive on December 11, 2020. Looking at past instances where ALNY's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 33 of 41 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

Following a +5.27% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where ALNY advanced for three days, in 274 of 333 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

ALNY may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8289258-alnylam-pharmaceuticals-alny-132-69-enters-uptrend-as-momentum-indicator-ascends-above-0-level-on-dec-14-2020)
